---
title: "4. Preserve & Share"
description: "Archive research outputs, publish openly, obtain persistent identifiers, and maximize research impact"
phase_order: 4
sidebar: training
number-depth: 4
number-sections: true
number-offset: [0,4,0]
page-layout: full
toc: false
css: handbook-styles.css
title-block-style: none
---

{{< include _preserve-and-share.qmd >}}
